sourcesContent:
export const linkHomeDesign = {
  pageWrapper: "min-h-screen bg-slate-50 py-8 px-4",

  container: "max-w-6xl mx-auto space-y-6",

  header: "space-y-1",

  title: "text-3xl font-semibold text-slate-900",

  subtitle: "text-sm text-slate-500",

  path: "text-xs text-indigo-500 font-medium",

  navbar:
    "flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4 bg-white p-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  searchWrapper:
    "flex items-center gap-2 bg-slate-100 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg w-full sm:w-72",

  searchInput:
    "bg-transparent outline-none text-sm w-full",

  addButton:
    "inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm transition",

  form:
    "grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm",

  input:
    "border border-slate-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 outline-none",

  submitButton:
    "bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 transition",

  cancelButton:
    "bg-slate-200 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 flex items-center justify-center",

  table:
    "bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 divide-y divide-slate-100",

  row:
    "grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 items-center px-6 py-4 text-sm hover:bg-slate-50 transition",
};
